## Skill affected

Which skill(s) does this change? (or "repo infrastructure" for non-skill changes)

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI, install scripts, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill directory name matches `name` field in SKILL.md
- [ ] `name` starts with `login-enterprise-` prefix
- [ ] SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
- [ ] `compatibility` field lists all environment requirements
- [ ] No internal/proprietary references
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or API keys
- [ ] `npx skills-ref validate` passes
- [ ] Tested with Claude Code and/or OpenAI Codex and/or Gemini CLI

## Agents tested

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] OpenAI Codex
- [ ] Gemini CLI
